// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalajs.js
import scala.scalajs.js.annotation.*
import scala.scalajs.js.typedarray.*
import scala.scalajs.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, JsRawSegment, KoffiFacade, KoffiFn, NativeLoader, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class BorrowedBufferBindingsImpl extends BorrowedBufferBindings:
    import BorrowedBufferBindingsImpl.*

    def mallocChunk(n: Long)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Ffi.Borrowed[Buffer[Byte]] =
        val retValRaw = facade.mallocChunk(js.BigInt(n.toString))
        val __kyoBorrowedResult = Ffi.Borrowed.wrap(if js.isUndefined(retValRaw) || retValRaw == null then null else
            val retVal = KoffiFacade.decodeBorrowedBytes(retValRaw.asInstanceOf[js.Any], n.toInt)
            (if (java.lang.System.getProperty("kyo.ffi.checkedBorrows") == "true") Buffer.Unsafe.wrapBorrowedChecked[Byte](retVal, n.toInt, kyo.ffi.internal.BufferFactory.currentBorrowOwner()) else Buffer.Unsafe.wrapBorrowed[Byte](retVal, n.toInt)))
        __kyoBorrowedResult
end BorrowedBufferBindingsImpl

object BorrowedBufferBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.BorrowedBufferBindings")
    private val facade = KoffiFacade.load(
        NativeLoader.jsResolve("kyo_borrowed_buf"),
        Seq(
            KoffiFn("mallocChunk", "malloc_chunk", "void*", Seq[js.Any]("int64".asInstanceOf[js.Any]))
        )
    )
end BorrowedBufferBindingsImpl
